read_skill.mechanism: Read the SKILL.md path named by LOAD_ORDER.md

dispatch_agent.fallback: Sequential self-review in a fresh context window: re-read the task brief and the exact base..head diff package with no implementation context carried over. This is a degraded substitute and MUST NOT be reported as equivalent to an independent reviewer.
dispatch_agent.limitations: Reviews are NOT independent. Report degraded independence.

create_task.mechanism: Native planning list is not a durable artifact
create_task.fallback: Track task state in .wcbs/runs/<run-id>/progress-ledger.jsonl instead of a native task list.
create_task.limitations: Task state must live on disk.

request_human_approval.fallback: Halt, print the exact pending action, and require an explicit human reply before proceeding.
request_human_approval.limitations: Confirm the halt actually blocks before relying on it.
